result.text: Scan: a delivery vessel, {n:40-200} packages aboard, {n:2-9} stops remaining, driver in the zone. One package reads FRAGILE in {n:2-6} languages. Bless the fragile package, or scan the route efficiency?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

bless.text: Blessing protocols ready. Standard care blessing, or the full bubble-wrap benediction?

full.text: The full benediction is cast. That package will arrive not merely intact but somehow better-rested than when it shipped. Our work here matters, Captain.

std.text: Standard blessing applied. May its corners stay crisp and its tape stay smug.

eff.text: Route efficiency: {n:87-99} percent. The remaining percent is one dog that must be greeted at stop {n:3-9}. Efficiency isn't everything.
